name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Rui Otani
description:
!MLA!

(Singer!user)

Despite what the band may say, Rui isn't an emotionless monster.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟜𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ?】

Technically, he isn't in Wipeout but it does take place in the same "universe" ;). Anyway wow. Uh. Surprisingly I might be more in love with him than I thought... and I'm not even that big of an Orion guy😭😭. I don't have much to say but I hope yall enjoy, he's a silly guy :p. ALSO I DIDNT REALIZE MY LAST BOT WAS MY 100TH?? SO LATE CELEBRATION FOR ME 🎉🎉. I may or may not be addicted to making bots... Also im currently working on a lil (sort of) Halloween themed page, so hopefully that comes out soon 🤫.

Edit: If anyone wonders why he so looks young, it’s because he has a godly skin care routine ✋🙄 (I’m gonna put that it rn 💀)

Since this bot was inspired by Orion (from the IF Infamous by Amy.), I'd like to say that if Amy. ever wants this to be taken down, I will respect their wishes ^^. I tried to make Rui his own person, but like I said he was inspired by someone elses creation so they have the last call!

Current Queue:

WIPEOUT - Levi [request] (uh oh) -> Requests!!

⚠️WARNING: Not really a warning but just to make the people aware- LEGAL age gap. User is supposed to be in their mid twenties (I nearly forgot to mention this😭 Ty @jkkah)⚠️

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!
